task: Write a Python function that parses an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket/path/to/file') and returns just the bucket name
Create a JSON CloudFormation template snippet that defines an AWS IAM role with a trust relationship allowing EC2 instances to assume it
Write a regex pattern that matches valid AWS Lambda function names (alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores only, 1-64 characters)
